## Helpers.generateUniqueBaseId() function

Generate a unique base ID by appending a counter if needed.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function generateUniqueBaseId(baseId: string, existingIds: ReadonlySet<string> | ReadonlyArray<string>, maxAttempts?: number): Result<string>;
```
